title: nasa dyeri subsp. australis
intro: Nasa dyeri subsp. australis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the "Tibetan woolly plant". This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nasa dyeri subsp. australis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, as well as its ability to exhibit antibacterial and antifungal properties. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used in traditional medicine preparations, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
